data.title: Sevens Atelier Partners with OrangeTee & Tie for Marketing Collaboration
data.description:
Pan Asian Holdings Limited ( (SG:5EW) ) has issued an update.

Sevens Atelier Limited’s subsidiary, Sevens Build Pte. Ltd. (SBPL), has entered into a memorandum of understanding with OrangeTee & Tie Pte. Ltd. (OTT) to establish a non-exclusive marketing collaboration framework. This partnership aims to leverage OTT’s extensive agent network and marketing platforms to enhance campaign distribution and brand visibility, ultimately broadening audience reach and supporting lead generation for both companies within homeowner and investor communities.

More about Pan Asian Holdings Limited

Sevens Atelier Limited, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Sevens Build Pte. Ltd. (SBPL), operates in Singapore as a design-and-build company specializing in turnkey delivery of bespoke landed homes. The company offers services in design development, cost planning, project management, and construction execution for homeowners.

data.title: Nidec Corporation Corrects Financial Statements for FY2025
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Nidec ( (JP:6594) ).

Nidec Corporation announced corrections to its financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2025, due to unpaid tariffs and suspected improper accounting in its subsidiaries. These corrections resulted in minor changes to net sales and more significant decreases in operating profit and profit before income taxes, impacting stakeholders and reflecting the company’s commitment to transparency and accuracy.

data.title: United Hampshire US REIT Announces Tax Status for Q4 2025
data.description:
United Hampshire US Real Estate Investment Trust ( (SG:ODBU) ) has issued an update.

United Hampshire US Real Estate Investment Trust announced that it has not engaged in any trade or business activities within the United States for the taxable period from October 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. Consequently, distributions for this period are not subject to U.S. withholding tax under Section 1446 of the Internal Revenue Code, and unitholders can treat the U.S. source interest as portfolio interest, potentially impacting their tax liabilities favorably.

More about United Hampshire US Real Estate Investment Trust

United Hampshire US Real Estate Investment Trust is a real estate investment trust established under Singaporean law, managed by United Hampshire US REIT Management Pte. Ltd. The company focuses on real estate investments, particularly in the United States, although it operates under Singapore’s jurisdiction.

Average Trading Volume: 335,847

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $295.4M

data.title: Tong Ren Tang Expands Market Reach with Cambodian License
data.description:
Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co ( (HK:1666) ) has provided an announcement.

Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co. Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Company Limited, has received a traditional medicine registration license from Cambodia’s Ministry of Health. This license allows the sale of ‘Tong Ren Tang Angong Niuhuang Wan’ in Cambodia, facilitating the expansion of the company’s distribution channels and market presence in the region. While this development is beneficial for market expansion, it is not expected to have a significant immediate impact on the company’s overall operations or performance.

More about Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co

Tong Ren Tang Technologies Co. Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in China, primarily engaged in the production and sale of traditional Chinese medicines. The company focuses on expanding its market presence through its subsidiaries, including Beijing Tong Ren Tang Chinese Medicine Company Limited.

data.title: Skanska Secures NOK 750M Contract for NTNU Building in Norway
data.description:
Skanska AB ( ($SE:SKA.B) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Skanska has secured a contract with Statsbygg to construct a new university building for The Norwegian University of Science and Technology (NTNU) in Trondheim, Norway, valued at NOK 750 million (about SEK 710 million). This project, which will be included in Skanska’s Nordic order bookings for Q3 2025, will feature a six-story, 18,000 square meter facility designed to enhance NTNU’s academic environment for economics and innovation. The construction will commence in October 2025 and is expected to be completed by December 2027, potentially strengthening Skanska’s position in the Nordic construction market.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:SKA.B) stock is a Buy with a SEK254.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Skanska AB stock, see the SE:SKA.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Skanska AB

Skanska Group is one of the world’s largest construction and project development companies, with 2024 revenue totaling SEK 177 billion. The company operates across select markets in the Nordics, Europe, and the USA, creating innovative and sustainable solutions that support healthy living.

data.title: TC Unterhaltungselektronik AG to Acquire United Eco Solutions America Inc.
data.description:
An update from TC Unterhaltungselektronik-AG ( (DE:TCU) ) is now available.

TC Unterhaltungselektronik AG, a company involved in the electronics sector, is undergoing a strategic realignment with a focus on sustainability. The company announced a significant move to acquire United Eco Solutions America Inc., a Texas-based platform specializing in sustainability and emission certificates, through a contribution in kind. This acquisition involves exchanging up to 60 million ordinary shares of TC Unterhaltungselektronik AG for 100% of United Eco’s shares. The move positions TC Unterhaltungselektronik AG to capitalize on the North American carbon market, leveraging United Eco’s 300,000 verified emission certificates and AI-powered trading platform, which promises long-term recurring revenue and strengthens its standing in the global voluntary carbon market.

More about TC Unterhaltungselektronik-AG

Average Trading Volume: 4,620

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €618.2K
